flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Ensign College fell 15% between 2022 and 2024 (63.6% → 54.4%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Ensign College rose 11% between 2014 and 2017 ($5.8k → $6.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Ensign College rose 187% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6k → 7.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ensign College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).
